migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
description: Which 2025-10 CC objectives each source transcript materially covers, graded from an IP-safe keyword-frequency scan (signal-term counts, not transcript text). 'strong' = the transcript is a primary teaching source for the objective; 'partial' = touched; 'none' = not a source. Drives which objectives can seed fact cards from distilled transcript concepts (PR-6/7) versus which need blueprint/NIST grounding.

1.1.title: Understand the security concepts of information assurance

1.4.title: Understand the ISC2 Code of Ethics

notable.crypto_depth: domain-5 is a dedicated cryptography + data-security source (symmetric/asymmetric/hybrid, hashing, digital signatures, sanitization: degauss/cross-cut shred/overwrite). Strong for 5.1.
notable.d4_depth: domain-4 is a comprehensive networking source (OSI, TCP/IP, ports, ARP/ICMP/DHCP, firewalls, VLAN/VPN/NAC/DMZ, wireless, IoT/ICS, cloud/virtualization).
notable.study_layer: how2study-recaps is the exam-strategy + cross-domain recap source (feeds the exam_strategy bank and remediation loop).
